corrections.old_value: 1. SoCYP72A1003 is a newly discovered non-canonical CYP72 homologue with distinct JA-responsive aerial expression. 2. In yeast, together with SoCYP72A984 and SoCYP716A379, it enabled quillaic acid production. 3. In G. elegans hairy roots, expression of SoCYP72A1003 alone yielded a peak matching the SO1861 standard.
corrections.reason: Point 2 says it enabled 'quillaic acid' production in yeast; the paper refers to QA standard/production, but does not explicitly state the full metabolite name here, and the exact naming should not be over-interpreted. The rest is supported.
